title: randia mollis
intro: Randia mollis, also known as the soft randia, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, characterized by its soft and velvety leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Randia mollis include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
